reference_groups.name: A prophet and poet who probably prophesied after the destruction of Nineveh Hab 1:1; 3:1
His hymn of praise of the majesty of God Hab 3

ai_enrichment.error: error: Schema validation failed for /app/data/processed/topical_references/unified/themes/themes_catalog.json: 'canonical' is a required property

definitions.text: Embrace, the eighth of the twelve minor prophets. Of his personal history we have no reliable information. He was probably a member of the Levitical choir. He was contemporary with Jeremiah and Zephaniah.
